display_text: Dust of Appearance, Cost: 80: Consumable item that creates a large area (1050 radius) for 12 seconds, granting True Sight and applying a -20% movement slow to revealed invisible enemy units. The slow debuff persists for 8 seconds after leaving the area, and revealed units take 25 damage. Essential tool for countering invisibility ganks and controlling vision during engagements. Stats: CD: 30s, Duration: 12s, Slow: -20%, Damage: 25, Radius: 1050, Linger Duration: 8s.

display_text: Dust of Appearance, Cost: 80: Critical early-game item for laning supports to provide security against roaming invisible heroes like Riki or Bounty Hunter. Carrying Dust deters ganks and allows you to secure kills on low-health invisible targets trying to escape. Its low cost makes it a staple for vision control in the first 10-15 minutes.
search_text: early game detection, support starting item, counter roamer, anti-gank item, laning vision, secure kills, catch invisible, escape counter, Dust of Appearance, early game, support

display_text: Dust of Appearance, Cost: 80: Use proactively before entering high-ground or Roshan pit to reveal sentry wards or invisible heroes. The area slow makes it effective for chasing down elusive invisibility-based heroes. Always carry at least one charge during team fights or when pushing against heroes with escape or initiation via invisibility.
